name: Phatra Leasing Public Company Limited
summary: Phatra Leasing Public Company Limited provides leasing services primarily to corporate enterprises in Thailand. It operates through two segments, Land Vehicles and Others segments. The company leases sedan vehicle, aircrafts, watercraft, and commercial vehicles, as well as business jets. It also leases machinery, computers, and manufacturing equipment. The company was incorporated in 1987 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
